Assembly: The assembly dhQueIlex1.hap2.1 is based on 74x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 9 (21.1 - 23.6 Mbp) and chromosome 6 (1.7 - 7.3 Mbp) are unknown. There is a haplotypic inversion on chromosome 1 (21.2 - 25.6).
